message:
Fix parser memory leaks with comprehensive errdefer cleanup

Add errdefer blocks to clean up partial allocations when parsing fails:

- parse(): Clean up successfully parsed statements on error
- parseFunctionDef(): Clean up args, type annotations, return type
- parseClassDef(): Clean up base classes and body
- parseBlock(): Clean up parsed statements on error
- parseDecorated(): Clean up decorator nodes on error
- parseTry(): Clean up body, handlers, else/finally blocks

Results:
- Simple files: 0 leaks
- blinker import: 0 leaks (was 58+)
- Flask import: 6 leaks (was 22, down from 58+)

Remaining leaks are in expression parsing edge cases when
parsing complex external Python modules fails mid-expression.
